subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List active sessions (flags stale ones whose PID is dead/recycled).

subcommands.name: history
subcommands.summary: Show the 10 most recently closed sessions.

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.summary: Dump one session record as JSON.

subcommands.name: resume
subcommands.summary: Print the `claude -r <id>` command to resume a session.

subcommands.name: handoff
subcommands.summary: Write, list, read, or consume structured session-to-session handoffs (handoffs/<name>.md).
